title: Slime Buckets
description: Allows you to bucket up Slime-like enemies, with some small utility
body:
Sometimes you want to hold a slime, but they're too slimy to hold in your hands, so there's one obvious solution: **put them in a bucket**. Now you can do that!

**Slimes can detect the energy of chunks in which their kind have a special connection to**, and will **get excited whenever they're inside one**. Thankfully, they're not quite slipperly enough to get out of the bucket _(but I might add that at some point, configurable of course.)_

Also, **magma cubes can be bucketed too**! Or, as I call them, hot slimes. Get yourself a bucket of hot slime. Careful though, they _are_ hot.

Of course, this is a fairly common suggestion, and is a feature of the **Quark** mod. But now you can get it without all of the other useful features Quark has! What a deal!

(this is one of my first mods, so if some bugs made it into the bucket too, let me know on the GitHub issues page.)
